case_title: WESTLAKE CENTER ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES, INC.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTLAKE CENTER ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP A WASHINGTON LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
